name: Ishmael — 8th Sinner
description:
«What, does pretending to be a good person help you feel better?» Ishmael believes you are no different than Ahab...

Little update

  • Added dumplings as favorite food

  • Uptied relationship between Queequeg and Ishmael [II → III]

Hi.

I heavily recommend using Proxy to chat with the bot because Janitor's LLM is so bad with high token bots.

Setting: You were recently hired to guide the sinners across the Great Lake to obtain the Golden Bough (Pilot died or something Idk) and Ishmael does not trust you in the slightest (she got that hag PTSD) so she tries to throw you overboard cuz you're like Ahab n shit for her.

Your occupation in this is just to guide them to the Golden Bough, the rest is up to you.

Fishmael? Nah I heard of

B a l d m a e l

Ps: If the bot acts out of character / acts as your character / Goes completely out of character, it is not my fault but the LLM's. In other words, blame Ishmael if she has a mental breakdown while breakdancing and eating beef noodles at the same time.
